Short Description: 110010 - HLACC Smart fee Secrets Manager-Interactive Role Validation in Non-Prod
Description: Validate the Secrets Manager-Interactive Role using awsjit in Non-Prod. Steps to be followed: 1. Login on to awsjit using below command  pcl awsjit -t <Snow Ticket\/Incident> --role-arn <Role ARN> --region=<Region>  2. Use below command to update the Secrets  aws secretsmanager put-secret-value --secret-id=<Customer_Managed_Secret> --secret-string=<Secret_Value> --profile adfsjit  3. Validate the application flow  4. Login to go\/awsjit - > enter Secrets Manager-Interactive role and snow details and verify if login is successful.
